title: Stratfund Limited — Consumer harm
investigation_objective: ASIC issued interim design and distribution obligations stop orders against two products managed under Stratfund Limited's Australian Fixed Income Fund - the Wealthon Vault Development Fund and The People's Equity Fund - over deficiencies in their target market determinations. ASIC found the target market determination for the Wealthon Vault fund wrongly suggested a target market of retail investors seeking capital preservation and income, when the product was not designed for that purpose. The orders bar Stratfund from dealing in interests, giving a product disclosure statement, or providing general advice recommending the products to retail clients, and are described as part of ASIC's increased risk-based surveillance of managed investment schemes and private credit.
scope: Subject of interim ASIC stop orders barring dealings with retail clients in two of its managed products; Regulator found a target market determination misrepresented the products' suitability for capital-preservation and income-seeking investors; Part of ASIC's stated increased surveillance of managed investment schemes and private credit
